title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion API, a system that routes prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to synthesize responses. The creator tested Fusion against claimed Fable-level performance and found real-world results inconsistent, with Fusion sometimes slower and more expensive than single strong models.
writeup: The video covers OpenRouter's new Fusion API, which routes a prompt to multiple models and uses a judge model to synthesize a combined response, paired with OpenCode and a set of free models including MiniMax M3, Step 3.7 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM, and Kimi. The creator tests Fusion against its claimed Fable-level performance and reports inconsistent real-world results. The key takeaway: Fusion was sometimes slower and more expensive than single strong models, so the ensemble routing did not reliably outperform them.
